_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Group differences with medium effects were observed in measures of...short-term verbal and visual episodic memory (immediate recalls of RAVLT and ROCF)
details: Showed medium effect for immediate recall (A6: 8.31 ± 2.57 vs 10.06 ± 3.60, d=0.58) and small effect for delayed recall (A7: 8.63 ± 2.50 vs 9.06 ± 3.00, d=0.16) in NF1 vs controls
